feed.title: Rasoul Norouzi
feed.subtitle: Personal academic website of Rasoul Norouzi, PhD researcher at Tilburg University working on theory development, causal text mining, large language models, and graph-based analysis for the social sciences.

entry.title: Welcome
entry.content: Welcome to the new version of my personal academic website. I will use this blog for occasional notes on research, methods, and software tools.
entry.summary: A first note after migrating this site to al-folio.
